format.raw: 141 $DATE mrpp-srx550-dut01 RT_FLOW - RT_FLOW_SESSION_CREATE junos2626.192.0.2.1.40 source-address=$SRC_IP source-port=$SRC_PORT destination-address=$DST_IP destination-port=$DST_PORT service-name=ARP nat-source-address=192.0.2.1 nat-source-port=1 nat-destination-address=198.51.100.12 nat-destination-port=$CONN_ID src-nat-rule-name=None dst-nat-rule-name=None protocol-id=ARP policy-name=policy1 source-zone-name=trustZone destination-zone-name=untrustZone session-id=-3241 packet-incoming-interface=ge-0/0/1.0

xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator=""[^"]{1,30}"" arr_length="17">
    <Field position="0"  name="header_forward" />
    <Field position="1"  name="src_port" />
    <Field position="2"  name="dstn_ip" />
    <Field position="3"  name="dstn_port" />
    <Field position="4"  name="service_nm" />
    <Field position="5"  name="src_ip_nat" />
    <Field position="6"  name="src_nat_port" />
    <Field position="7"  name="dstn_ip_nat" />
    <Field position="8"  name="dstn_nat_port" />
    <Field position="9"  name="src_rule_nm" />
    <Field position="10" name="dstn_rule_nm" />
    <Field position="11" name="prtc_id" />
    <Field position="12" name="policy_nm" />
    <Field position="13" name="src_zone" />
    <Field position="14" name="dstn_zone" />
    <Field position="15" name="session_id" />
    <Field position="16" name="forwarded_for" />
    <Field position="17" name="packet_interface" convert_tag="[[@copy('forwarded_for')]][[@regexGet('[^"]+')]]" />
    <Field position="18" name="interface_msg"   convert_tag="[[@copy('forwarded_for')]][[@regexGet('.+')]]" />
    <Field position="19" name="logdt"            convert_tag="[[@copy('header_forward')]][[@regexGet('.+')]][[@replace('T',' ')]][[@date('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss','yyyyMMddHHmmss')]]" />
    <Field position="20" name="src_ip"           convert_tag="[[@copy('header_forward')]][[@regexGet('".+')]]" />
    <Field position="21" name="vendor"           convert_tag="[[@set('junipernetworks')]]" />
    <Field position="22" name="logtype"          convert_tag="[[@set('traffic')]]" />
    <Field position="23" name="parser_version"   convert_tag="[[@set('v2')]]" />
    <Field position="24" name="model"            convert_tag="[[@set('srx')]]" />
    <Field position="25" name="parser_info"      convert_tag="[[@set('[Juniper]_srx_traffic_v2_keyvalue')]]" />
    <Field position="26" name="eqp_type"         convert_tag="[[@set('fw')]]" />
    <Field position="27" name="original_log"     convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
